title: Trump Seems Emboldened With New Threats in Truth Social Post Over Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: In an expletive-filled social media post, Mr. Trump said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he will bomb bridges and power plants.
summary_public: In an expletive-filled social media post, Mr. Trump said Iran should open the Strait of Hormuz or he will bomb bridges and power plants.
